message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title RqP – Request Resource

actor "Requesting Party\n(RqP)" as RqP
participant "Client Application (CA)\n«Custom Application»" as CA
participant "Resource Server (RS)\n«Custom Application»" as RS
participant "Authorization Server (AS)\nForgeRock Access Manager" as AS
participant "Content Server (CS)\n«Custom Application»" as CS

box "Client Application (CA)" #LightGreen
    participant "User Interface" as UI
end box

box "Resource Server (RS)" #LightOrange
    participant "REST API" as RS_API
    database "Resource" as RS_DB
    database "Credential" as RS_Cred
end box

box "Authorization Server (AS)" #LightYellow
    participant "AM API" as AM_API
    participant "UMA API" as UMA_API
    participant "OAuth API" as OAuth_API
end box

box "Content Server (CS)" #LightCyan
    participant "REST API" as CS_API
    database "Data" as CS_DB
end box

RqP -> UI: Authenticate
activate UI
UI -> AM_API: Authenticate
activate AM_API
AM_API --> UI: Authenticated
deactivate AM_API
deactivate UI

RqP -> UI: Access Interface
activate UI
UI -> UI: Obtain Resource Id\n(maybe from Discover Resources)
UI -> RS_API: GET /share/resources/{resourceId}\nscopes (no valid RPT)
activate RS_API
RS_API -> RS_DB: Get_id
activate RS_DB
RS_DB --> RS_API: meta data
deactivate RS_DB
RS_API -> RS_Cred: Get PAT
activate RS_Cred
RS_Cred --> RS_API: PAT
deactivate RS_Cred
deactivate RS_API

note right of UI
Get permission ticket for the\nresource and scope
end note

RS_API -> UMA_API: POST /am/uma/permission_request\nresource_id + scopes
activate UMA_API
UMA_API --> RS_API: permission ticket
deactivate UMA_API
RS_API --> UI: permission ticket + AS URI
deactivate UI

activate UI
UI -> UI: Get client auth basic
note left of UI
Get claim token for the\nRequesting Party (RqP)
end note
UI -> OAuth_API: POST /am/oauth2/access_token\nscope=openid\nSSO session
activate OAuth_API
OAuth_API -> OAuth_API: Validate SSO session
OAuth_API --> UI: claim token
deactivate OAuth_API
deactivate UI

note left of UI
Get Requesting Party Token (RPT)\nusing the permission ticket\nand claim token
end note

activate UI
UI -> OAuth_API: POST /am/oauth2/access_token\ngrant_type=urn:ietf:params:oauth:grant-type:uma-ticket\nscope=..., ticket=..., claim_token=..., claim_token_format=...
activate OAuth_API
OAuth_API -> UMA_API: Check Access
activate UMA_API
UMA_API -> UMA_API: No Policy for RqP + Resource + scopes\nCreate Access Request for Resource Owner
UMA_API --> OAuth_API: No Access, request Submitted
deactivate UMA_API
deactivate OAuth_API
OAuth_API --> UI: Error: Request Submitted
deactivate UI
deactivate UI

@enduml
```
